_description: 13 evidence-based video flows (A-M). Each flow earned its letter from 15+ weighted occurrences in reference ad analysis. Ported from Tricia's video-compiler system.

A.name: testimonial
A.description: Customer testimonial with authentic reaction and product discovery arc

B.name: PAS
B.description: Problem-Agitate-Solve framework — start with pain, amplify, present solution
B.structure: problem → agitate → solution intro → proof → CTA

C.name: challenge
C.description: Challenge format — dare the viewer, show the attempt, reveal the result
C.structure: challenge intro → attempt → struggle → success → CTA

D.name: slap
D.description: Pattern interrupt (SLAP) — stop scrolling with unexpected visual, then pivot to product

E.name: convenience_solve
E.description: Convenience-focused — the busy person's salvation. Show the problem (no time), show the solution (easy prep)
E.structure: pain (no time) → discovery → ease of use → satisfaction → CTA

F.name: compiled_montage
F.description: Multi-KOL compiled montage — many voices saying the same thing = social proof wall
F.structure: KOL 1 reaction → KOL 2 reaction → ... → product → CTA

G.name: brand_story
G.description: Brand narrative — origin story, mission, why this exists. Emotional connection.

H.name: what_i_eat
H.description: Day-in-life food diary format — what I eat in a day/week. Aspirational lifestyle.

I.name: sales_hype
I.description: Hard sales push — urgency, scarcity, limited time offer. Bottom of funnel.

J.name: curiosity_reveal
J.description: Open loop — tease a secret/discovery, delay the reveal to retain attention.

K.name: before_after
K.description: Before/after transformation — show the contrast. Weight loss, skin, energy, lifestyle.
K.structure: before state → transition → after state → proof → CTA

L.name: brand_montage
L.description: Kinetic text + visual montage. No voiceover — text carries the narrative. Music-driven.
L.structure: kinetic text blocks + product visuals + music sync

M.name: vo_montage
M.description: Full voiceover montage — narrator speaks over muted KOL/product clips. Professional feel.
M.structure: VO narrative over visual sequence (all blocks muted)

flow_rules.minimum_evidence: 15+ weighted occurrences in reference analysis before earning a letter
